Package nl.mtvehicles.core.infrastructure.dependencies.skript.effects

Klasse EffAddRiderMember

java.lang.Object
ch.njol.skript.lang.TriggerItem
ch.njol.skript.lang.Statement
ch.njol.skript.lang.Effect
nl.mtvehicles.core.infrastructure.dependencies.skript.effects.EffAddRiderMember
Alle implementierten Schnittstellen:
ch.njol.skript.lang.Debuggable, ch.njol.skript.lang.SyntaxElement
@Name("Add rider/member to MTV vehicle") @Description("Add a rider or member to an MTV vehicle.") @Examples({"add {_player} as a rider of the vehicle {_car}","add player {_offlinePlayer} as a member to mtv vehicle {_car}"}) public class EffAddRiderMember extends ch.njol.skript.lang.Effect
